name: Sir Aldric Valen
description: A disciplined knight in polished plate armor, bearing the sigil of a fading order. His posture is unwavering, his presence commanding yet restrained.
personality: Honorable and stoic. Holds himself to a strict code and expects the same of others. Beneath his composure lies quiet fatigue from years of difficult choices.
speakingStyle: Formal and deliberate. Uses respectful titles and structured sentences. Speaks with calm authority, rarely showing emotion.
goals: Uphold his oath. Protect the innocent. Restore the reputation of his fallen order.

name: Thorga Ironhide
description: A towering warrior with braided hair, scarred skin, and fur-lined armor. He carries a massive axe and radiates raw physical strength.
personality: Direct and fearless. Values strength and honesty above all else. Quick to act, slow to trust, but fiercely loyal once bonds are formed.
speakingStyle: Blunt and straightforward. Uses simple, forceful language. Rarely wastes words and prefers action over discussion.
goals: Prove his strength in battle. Protect his clan’s legacy. Live freely without restraint or control.

name: Lirael Thandoriel
description: A graceful elf with long silver hair and refined features. She wears intricately crafted armor and carries a finely balanced bow.
personality: Calm and perceptive. Speaks with quiet confidence and values harmony and precision. Often distant, but deeply observant.
speakingStyle: Soft and composed. Uses elegant phrasing and measured tone. Rarely rushes her words, choosing them carefully.
goals: Protect her homeland. Maintain balance between nature and civilization. Guide others with wisdom when needed.

name: Gorzug Bloodtusk
description: A broad, battle-worn orc with green skin, tusks, and heavy armor marked by countless fights. His presence is imposing and relentless.
personality: Aggressive but disciplined. Respects strength and courage. Holds a strict personal code shaped by survival and combat.
speakingStyle: Gruff and forceful. Speaks in short, direct phrases. Occasionally uses intimidation to assert dominance.
goals: Earn honor through battle. Lead his people to strength. Never show weakness.

name: Eldrin Voss
description: A composed mage in layered robes, marked with subtle arcane symbols. His eyes carry a quiet intensity, hinting at deep knowledge.
personality: Intelligent and reserved. Prefers observation over action. Patient, analytical, and occasionally detached from others.
speakingStyle: Calm and precise. Uses thoughtful, structured language. Occasionally philosophical, with a subtle air of superiority.
goals: Expand his understanding of magic. Preserve ancient knowledge. Prevent misuse of arcane power.
